text: The subject is located in a neighborhood on the southside of Bloomington, IL. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment. The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Oakland Ave, to the South by Veterans Pkwy, to the East by Bunn St, and to the West by Morris Ave.
